gcp.essentialcontacts.organizations.cont.description: Adds a new contact for a resource.

required.description: Required. The resource to save this contact for. Format: organizations/{organization_id}, folders/{folder_id} or project

gcp.essentialcontacts.organizations.cont.description: Lists all contacts for the resource that are subscribed to the specified notification categories, including contacts inherited from any parent resources.

required.description: Required. The name of the resource to compute contacts for. Format: organizations/{organization_id}, folders/{folder_id}

gcp.essentialcontacts.organizations.cont.description: Allows a contact admin to send a test message to contact to verify that it has been configured correctly.

required.description: Required. The name of the resource to send the test message for. All contacts must either be set directly on this resour

gcp.essentialcontacts.organizations.cont.description: Updates a contact. Note: A contact's email address cannot be changed.

required.description: Output only. The identifier for the contact. Format: {resource_type}/{resource_id}/contacts/{contact_id}

can_come_from.note: [tier 1/exact] call gcp.essentialcontacts.organizations.contacts.list, iterate response["contacts"][], extract item["name"] → fill {contactId}

required.description: Required. The name of the contact to delete. Format: organizations/{organization_id}/contacts/{contact_id}, folders/{fol

gcp.essentialcontacts.organizations.cont.description: Lists the contacts that have been set on a resource.

required.description: Required. The parent resource name. Format: organizations/{organization_id}, folders/{folder_id} or projects/{project_id

produces_fields.note: resource identity — use as name/parent param for .get()
